source_pr.title: plan: prepare possible property for logical Sort/TopN/Projection
source_pr.body: Sort/Top-N/Projection doesn't manage property correctly. e.g. For sort/top-n, if the `ByItems` is the same with group-by items, we actually can choose stream agg but don't in current master.

symptoms: sql: "select count(*) from (select * from t order by b) t group by b", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select count(*) from (select * from t order by b) t group by b", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select count(*) from (select * from t order by b) t group by b", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)

analysis:

Triage summary: sql: "select count(*) from (select * from t order by b) t group by b", (plan/physical_plan_test.go)
